core.label: XSLT Fundamentals
core.description: Transform XML documents using templates and XPath.

topics.label: XSLT Basics
topics.description: XSLT transforms XML to HTML, text, or other XML. Uses template-based processing.

topics.label: Templates & match
topics.description: xsl:template match="pattern" defines transformation rules. Templates match XPath patterns.

topics.label: XPath Expressions
topics.description: Navigate XML trees with XPath — /, //, @, [], predicates. XPath selects nodes.

topics.label: value-of & for-each
topics.description: xsl:value-of extracts values, xsl:for-each iterates over node sets.

topics.label: Conditionals
topics.description: xsl:if and xsl:choose/when/otherwise for conditional output.

topics.label: Sorting & Variables
topics.description: xsl:sort for ordering, xsl:variable and xsl:param for data.

topics.label: apply-templates
topics.description: xsl:apply-templates for recursive processing. The key to modular XSLT.

topics.label: Output Methods
topics.description: xsl:output method="html|xml|text". Control the output format.
